name: Festive Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream the softened cream cheese until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed.
2. Gradually add brown sugar, cinnamon, ginger, salt, and cloves, mixing until combined.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in pumpkin, milk, and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the edge and center comes out clean.
7. Cool slightly on a wire rack.
8. In a separate bowl, blend sour cream and sugar together.
9. Spread the mixture over the warm pie.
10. Return the pie to the oven and bake an additional 3-5 minutes or until the topping is set.
11. Let cool on a wire rack before serving.
